meta.title: Approaches towards Solving ARC AGI
meta.description:
📜Open source repo access at https://github.com/TrelisResearch/minimal-arc

💡 Apply for OR sponsor the Trelis ARC AGI Team:
https://trelis.com/arc-agi-2/

📧 Get Trelis AI Tutorials by Email
Subscribe on Substack: https://trelis.substack.com

Video Links:
- ARC Prize Task: https://arcprize.org/play?task=e3721c99
- 2024 ARC Winners on MLST: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mTX_sAq--zY
- Greenblatt approach: https://redwoodresearch.substack.com/p/getting-50-sota-on-arc-agi-with-gpt

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 What is ARC AGI?
1:00 Solving ARC Manually
3:59 Broad approaches to solving ARC AGI
8:04 Simple DSL Approach (Domain Specific Language)
12:33 Simple LLM Guided Program Approach
16:04 Simple Neural Net Approach (with beam and depth-first search)
28:24 Overview of ARC training and evaluation data and preparation
33:44 Detailed DSL Approach (Domain Specific Language)
48:47 LLM Guided Search (in detail)
1:09 Test time training approach, with depth-first search
2:00 Apply for the Trelis ARC AGI 2 team
